title: Driver Available Trips Filtering and Smart Ordering - Frontend

requirements.summary: Update AvailableTripsSection component to display backend-filtered and ordered trips without additional client-side filtering
acceptanceCriteria: AvailableTripsSection component renders trips returned from backend getRequestedTrips hook
No additional filtering logic is added in the frontend component
Existing trip card layout, pickup/dropoff display, and timestamp formatting remain unchanged
Loading and empty states continue to work correctly

file_operations.description: Ensure component relies solely on useGetRequestedTrips hook data without adding any client-side filtering logic. Verify that the component correctly displays trips in the order returned by the backend, maintaining existing UI layout with pickup/dropoff locations, timestamps, and the Accept button functionality. Confirm loading and empty states remain functional.

Review and ensure useGetRequestedTrips hook correctly calls actor.getRequestedTrips() and returns the trip list without any transformation or filtering. Verify the hook properly handles authentication state and query invalidation after trip acceptance.
